title: Numpad gadget — popup keys (hotspot.json › popup)
description: Fields required by buildNumpad(). Also inherits the base shell fields defined in panel.schema.json.

prompt.description: Question text shown above the numpad.

answer.description: Correct numeric answer the player must enter, e.g. "7" or "1957".

on_success.description: Message displayed when the player enters the correct answer.

on_fail.description: Message displayed when the player enters a wrong answer.

hint.description: Optional hint text. HINT button is hidden when this key is absent.
